title: Packing the Traditional Mesob and Wicker Assets: Preventing Snags and Scratches During Transit
excerpt: Pack mesob wicker assets: prevent snags scratches transit, traditional Ethiopian furniture protection, cultural household moving guide.
content:
Packing the traditional mesob and wicker assets: preventing snags and scratches during transit

Mesob woven rims and wicker chairs snag on truck hardware, door casings, and each other—scratches become frayed unraveling impossible match artisan weave. Snag prevention means rim disks, vertical orientation, and zero rope sawing on dry fiber.

This guide prevents snags and scratches on mesob and wicker during transit.

Snag risk points

  • Metal truck wall E-track hooks.
  • Unpadded doorway turns.
  • Strap direct on weave—use buckle pad.
  • Stack weight on rim horizontal.
  • Dragging on cobble—lift always.

Packing mesob

Plywood disk under brim; bubble brim edge; blanket wrap; vertical between padded walls; strap buckle on blanket not wicker.

Wicker chairs and baskets

Leg caps cardboard; chairs stack max two rotated; baskets tissue lined no collapse load inside.

Truck placement

Mid-deck cultural items zone away from tools; mark NO STACK ON TOP; hand unload first destination respect.

Repair kit destination

Minor fray hide glue artisan contact—photo pre-move for insurance.

Active Movers cultural wrap

Brim disks standard mesob disclosed inventory.

Conclusion

Mesob and wicker arrive snag-free with rim protection, vertical travel, padded straps, lift-only carries—traditional assets need weave-aware packing not generic blanket burrito.
author: Active Movers Team
